question: What is my dog's name?

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-1-a
sessions.text:
user: I just adopted a beagle named Pepper.
assistant: Congrats!

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-1-b
sessions.text:
user: I love hiking on weekends.
assistant: Nice.

question: What city did I move to?

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-2-a
sessions.text:
user: I'm relocating to Lisbon next month for work.
assistant: Exciting move.

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-2-b
sessions.text:
user: My favorite color is teal.
assistant: Noted.

question: What programming language do I prefer?

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-3-a
sessions.text:
user: I prefer Rust for systems work; the borrow checker keeps me sane.
assistant: Got it.

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-3-b
sessions.text:
user: I drink black coffee.
assistant: OK.

question: What is my partner's profession?

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-4-a
sessions.text:
user: My partner is an architect — works on commercial spaces.
assistant: Cool.

sessions.label: session:syn-fr-4-b
sessions.text:
user: We're vegetarian.
assistant: Got it.

question: Which country am I planning my next vacation in?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-1-a
sessions.text:
user: I've been thinking about a trip to Asia later this year.
assistant: Anywhere specific?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-1-b
sessions.text:
user: Decided — Japan in October. Booked flights to Tokyo.
assistant: Have a great trip.

question: What instrument did I take up?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-2-a
sessions.text:
user: I want to learn an instrument this year.
assistant: Any in mind?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-2-b
sessions.text:
user: Started violin lessons last week, it's brutal but I love it.
assistant: Stick with it.

question: What did I name my new car?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-3-a
sessions.text:
user: Bought a yellow hatchback yesterday.
assistant: Nice.

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-3-b
sessions.text:
user: Named the car Bumblebee, obvious choice.
assistant: Ha!

question: What's the topic of the book I'm writing?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-4-a
sessions.text:
user: I want to write a popular-science book.
assistant: On what?

sessions.label: session:syn-ms-4-b
sessions.text:
user: Settled on octopus cognition. Three chapters drafted.
assistant: Sounds great.

question: In what month did I start my new job?

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-1-a
sessions.text:
user: Got the offer, signed yesterday.
assistant: Congrats.

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-1-b
sessions.text:
user: First day was March 6th. Long but good.
assistant: How'd it go?

question: How many years have I lived in Berlin?

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-2-a
sessions.text:
user: I moved to Berlin in 2019.
assistant: Nice.

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-2-b
sessions.text:
user: It's now 2026 — seven years in Berlin, hard to believe.
assistant: Time flies.

question: Which season do I prefer for hiking?

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-3-a
sessions.text:
user: Spring rains keep me indoors.
assistant: Mm.

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-3-b
sessions.text:
user: Autumn is peak hiking — crisp air, no bugs.
assistant: Agreed.

question: When does my lease end?

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-4-a
sessions.text:
user: Signed a one-year lease last August.
assistant: OK.

sessions.label: session:syn-tm-4-b
sessions.text:
user: Lease is up at the end of August. Need to decide whether to renew.
assistant: Mm.

question: Who is my dentist?

sessions.label: session:syn-et-1-a
sessions.text:
user: New dentist. Dr. Mendes — recommended by my coworker.
assistant: Hope it goes well.

sessions.label: session:syn-et-1-b
sessions.text:
user: Filling went fine. Dr. Mendes was gentle.
assistant: Glad.

question: What's my company called?

sessions.label: session:syn-et-2-a

assistant: Cool.

sessions.label: session:syn-et-2-b

sessions.label: session:syn-et-4-b

question: What allergy do I have to be careful about at restaurants?

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-1-a
sessions.text:

assistant: Yikes.

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-1-b
sessions.text:

assistant: Smart.

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-2-a

assistant: Fast delivery hopefully.

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-2-b

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-3-a

assistant: Could be worse.

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-3-b
sessions.text:

assistant: Ha.

question: What hobby did I pick up during the pandemic?

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-4-a
sessions.text:

sessions.label: session:syn-mh-4-b
